evidence.q1: Sections numbered 1-15; cross-reference 'Section 6' in Section 4 resolves.
evidence.q2: 'Customer Data', 'Customer Fine-Tune Artifacts', 'Approved Regions' defined once in Section 2 and used consistently.
evidence.q3: No vague time/quantity phrasing; example of specific: 'as little as 5 days' notice' in Section 9.
evidence.q4: No archaic diction; standard modern phrasing like 'entered into by and between' used throughout.
evidence.q5: No contradictory or broken sentences; e.g., Section 8 sentence on aspirational targets is coherent.
evidence.q6: Consistent register; e.g., 'Vendor will' used in Sections 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 15.
